title: Third and fourth assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§326. Third and fourth assistant district attorneys

           The offices of the third and fourth assistant district attorneys for the Fifteenth Judicial District of Louisiana are hereby created.

           Added by Acts 1956, No. 449, §1. Amended by Acts 1966, No. 256, §1.
doc_text:
§326.  Third and fourth assistant district attorneys
The offices of the third and fourth assistant district attorneys for the
Fifteenth Judicial District of Louisiana are hereby created.
Added by Acts 1956, No. 449, §1.  Amended by Acts 1966, No. 256,
§1.
